## Bug Description

## To Reproduce

1. Command or code used:
```bash
preprimer convert --input ... --output-dir ...
```

2. Input file format:
   - [ ] VarVAMP (.tsv)
   - [ ] ARTIC (.bed)
   - [ ] Olivar (.csv)
   - [ ] STS (.sts.tsv)

3. Expected behavior:


4. Actual behavior:

```
Error message here
```
